# Ari Harrison

> Architect of the Engine Between Models and Decisions

## About

Focused on the boundary where model reasoning meets structured systems - and where correctness, constraints, and consequences begin to matter. The gap between foundation models and real-world decisions is architecture - systems that translate probabilistic reasoning into reliable action under domain constraints. Then the engine has to meet people where they already work.

NovoMCP is one instantiation - applying this architecture to scientific discovery, where constraints are explicit and mistakes are costly. One computational chemistry engine, six surfaces over it: MCP for AI assistants (Novo + Novo Compute), a REST API for your own code, NovoWorkbench (desktop and cloud) for researchers who want a workstation, a Chrome extension for hover-profiling on PubChem and ChEMBL, a Word add-in for inline screening in manuscripts and grants, and a dashboard that is the spine - one account, one credit pool, one audit trail across all of them. 69 tools across ADMET, FAVES compliance, docking, MD, FEP, and QM, prediction layers over 122M+ indexed compounds.

Before this: autonomous discovery systems in high-stakes manufacturing - reinforcement learning agents that diagnosed failures and improved without intervention. The work is the engine between model reasoning and reliable action. The domain is wherever the stakes are high enough to demand it.

## The Stack

- The Engine: 122M+ compounds, 100+ data fields each, sub-50ms
- Tool Catalog: 69 in-silico tools across ADMET, FAVES, docking, MD, FEP, QM
- Compliance: FAVES V4 - 8 jurisdictions, 1,585 structural alerts
- Surfaces: MCP (Novo + Novo Compute) - REST API - NovoWorkbench (desktop + cloud) - Chrome extension - Word add-in - dashboard
- Verticals: Drug discovery + materials science
- Ecosystem: NVIDIA Inception, AWS Activate, Microsoft Founders Hub

## Publications

Research on how domain structure shapes reasoning - and how reasoning systems adapt under different objective and constraint regimes.

- FAVES V4: A Production-Deployed Compliance and Liability Screening System for Drug Discovery at 122M-Compound Scale (2026.05, ChemRxiv) - Production compliance and liability screening aligned to HHS/ONC FAVES and NIST AI 600-1. Single-API call returns regulatory status (DEA / FDA / CWC / EPA / EU REACH), 1,585 structural alerts, BOILED-Egg permeability, and InChIKey prior-art lookup. ~5 ms live latency, precomputed cache of 122,407,635 documents. Validated 362/362 compounds post-fix across five predetermined tests with documented governance bundle. DOI: 10.26434/chemrxiv.15003738/v2

- NovoExpert: State-of-the-Art ADMET Prediction on TDC Benchmarks (2026.04, ChemRxiv) - Five SOTA wins on Therapeutics Data Commons ADMET endpoints: CYP2D6 (0.778 AUPRC), CYP3A4 (0.916 AUPRC), CYP3A4 Substrate (0.648 AUPRC), Clearance Hepatocyte (0.602 Spearman), DILI (0.922 AUROC). CatBoost ensembles with MapLight and GIN fingerprints. DOI: 10.26434/chemrxiv.15000061/v2

## Projects

- Novo + Novo Compute (MCP surface): A domain-constrained reasoning system where models must operate through tools, data, and regulatory constraints to produce valid outputs. 69 tools across two MCP servers. Novo handles discovery intelligence - 122M+ compounds, ADMET predictions, FAVES V4 compliance, research search, lead optimization, the autonomous discovery funnel. Novo Compute handles simulation - GPU docking, GROMACS MD, quantum chemistry, neural network potentials, structure prediction, materials science. Two servers, not one: governance separation between free-tier and paid-only tools. https://novomcp.com/novo / https://novomcp.com/novo-compute

- NovoWorkbench (workstation surface): One workbench, two runtimes - desktop (Tauri, Apple notarized, local files + offline screening) and cloud (in-browser at app.novomcp.com/workbench, zero install, instant updates). Same canvas, same funnel, same account, same credit balance across both. https://releases.novomcp.com

- Chrome extension (browser surface): Hover any SMILES on PubChem, ChEMBL, DrugBank, or preprints for instant ADMET, FAVES compliance, similarity search. Side panel for advanced compute. "Continue in AI" deep-links into MCP-connected assistants. Manifest V3, whitelisted hosts only. Chrome Web Store: nfnhfmfmaccidmepfhllcllnjopeonmf

- Word add-in (editor surface, private beta): Inline SMILES profiling and FAVES tables in Word documents - manuscripts, protocols, grants. Office.js add-in, static-hosted manifest at addin.novomcp.com (S3 + CloudFront + ACM).

- REST API (developer surface): Single endpoint shape - POST /v1/tools/{name} with Bearer key. Tool catalog is the OpenAPI 3.1 spec. Same backend as MCP, zero code duplication. https://novomcp.com/api

- Dashboard (control room): app.novomcp.com. Not a chemistry surface - the spine. Auth, API keys, billing, credit usage, pipeline jobs with email notifications, file uploads. Where every surface authenticates.

- FAVES V4 - Compliance Inline: Three-tier detection with 1,585 structural alert patterns, 8 jurisdictions, BOILED-Egg permeability, prior art checks. 100% sensitivity/specificity on 102-compound benchmark.

- Product portfolio (https://realariharrison.github.io/portfolio.html): Each surface as a product case - problem, decision, build, outcome. Plus cross-cutting decisions: engine-first language, scale-to-zero by default, Azure to AWS migration, private-endpoint infra, research-preview tier model, human-in-the-loop over autonomy.
